'''Tobba''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who operated on the fringes of the [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Based on a massive Hutt ship, [[Y'Tobba]], he owned [[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt dragons]] that he brought to his ship from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] trying to impress [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].

{{Char-stub}}
